summary: Tested iMOs CRM fixes: More page reorganization (no title, profile card first, Invite Team in Administration), Add Contact modal with email field, Invite Team page loading fix, and branding logo endpoint. All features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: More page correctly shows profile card (Forest Ward) as first element - no 'More' title header
Administration section is first collapsible section for super_admin with 15 items including Admin Dashboard and Invite Team
Invite Team is second item in Administration section (after Admin Dashboard) as required
Settings section has 5 items (Security, Notifications, SMS/Email Toggle, Calendar, Integrations) - correctly does NOT include Invite Team anymore
Add Contact modal has all 4 fields: First name, Last name, Phone number, Email (optional)
Invite Team page loads correctly without stuck 'Loading...' state - shows 'Create & Invite User' section with 'Go to User Management' button
Backend branding/logo endpoint returns 200 with image/png content type
Backend health endpoint returns healthy status
seed_data_creation: Created test contact TEST_John Doe with email testjohn@example.com via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested fixes verified: 1) More page has no title header - profile card is first element, 2) Administration section contains Invite Team as second item after Admin Dashboard, 3) Settings section no longer has Invite Team, 4) Invite Team page loads without Loading stuck - shows Create & Invite User section, 5) Add Contact modal has email field, 6) Backend branding/logo endpoint works

features_verified.more_page_no_title_profile_first: PASS - No 'More' header, Forest Ward profile card is first visible element
features_verified.administration_section_with_invite_team: PASS - Administration section shows Admin Dashboard (1st), Invite Team (2nd), and other admin items
features_verified.settings_section_no_invite_team: PASS - Settings section has Security, Notifications, etc. but NOT Invite Team
features_verified.invite_team_page_no_loading_stuck: PASS - Page loads with 'Create & Invite User' section and 'Go to User Management' button visible
features_verified.add_contact_modal_has_email_field: PASS - Modal has First name, Last name, Phone number, and Email (optional) fields
features_verified.backend_branding_logo_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/branding/logo returns 200 with image/png content-type
features_verified.contacts_api_with_email: PASS - POST /api/contacts/{user_id} accepts email field and creates contact correctly

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested fixes verified working correctly
